use_cases: Users add multiple category tags to content in a content management system
Users assign descriptive labels to organize products in an e-commerce catalog
Users filter and sort datasets by entering custom tag criteria
Creators add topic or genre tags to categorize their content
Teams assign labels to items in project management or workflow tools
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist tag input component that allows users to add and remove tags via keyboard (Enter/Backspace) or click interactions. Features dark mode support, focus states with ring indicators, and hover effects on individual tags. Built as a self-contained atomic component with TypeScript interfaces for tags.
